title: viola × rouyana
intro: Viola × rouyana, also known as the hybrid violet, is a plant species resulting from the cross-breeding of Viola riviniana and Viola lactea. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Viola × rouyana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a useful treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
